concerns.text: SC-004 requires measuring NMF component stability via cosine similarity with a ≥0.95 threshold. T022 only mentions a 'multi-seed sweep' to 'calculate cosine similarity' but lacks a specific task to implement the threshold check, logging, or pass/fail logic required to satisfy the success criterion.

SC-005 requires measuring alignment accuracy against a ≤1 frame error threshold. T024 tasks 'alignment of extracted component weights' but omits a task to calculate the alignment error metric and validate it against the 1-frame limit defined in SC-005.

FR-009 mandates comparing correlations against a 'null model (linear mixing of behavior)'. T030 implements a 'time-shuffled baseline' (testing against randomness). There is no task to implement the specific 'linear mixing' null model required by FR-009, leaving the requirement unmet.

FR-002 mandates raising a hard error if missing data > 5%. T013 describes implementing interpolation for missing data but does not explicitly include a task to implement the error-throwing branch for the >5% case, risking silent pipeline continuation on invalid data.

T008 describes creating 'split.py' for 'time-based train/test splitting' but lacks the explicit tag or description linking it to the 'held-out dataset split' requirement of FR-008, creating a traceability gap for the validation constraint.
